reviews.comment:

They have nothing gluten-free to sell, and the bathrooms are dirty with no toilet paper.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. The restrooms are a bit neglected.

reviews.comment: There’s something peculiar about this place. I can’t quite put my finger on it, but I feel uneasy here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25keVFUUXdNekJSWVdaQ1FVa3lha3h1WkdsU2VtYxAB

reviews.comment:
Una pequeña pero suficiente estacion de servicios con todos los servicios, baños bien aunque escasos. Hotel y Restaurante del ACA, sencillo pero bien.  El lugar es muy tranquilo y de la Ruta 23 debe ser el pueblo más prolijo y cuidado, con muchos arboles plantados que prometen buenos lugares de sombra. Recomendable parada!

(Translated by Google)
A small but adequate service station with all the amenities; the restrooms are decent, though limited. The ACA hotel and restaurant are simple but fine. The place is very peaceful, and along Route 23, it must be the neatest and best-maintained town, with many trees that promise plenty of shade. Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kwdFZpMWtNbmxzTVRScVN6UXhOM0psZGxRelZuYxAB

reviews.comment:
Media hora haciendo fila para cargar. Poca variedad de productos de comida para comprar.

(Translated by Google)
Half an hour waiting in line to load. Limited selection of food products to buy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4eGJGZDRUSEZKTFhaaFVIRXdiWEV6VjBwS09VRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mucho tiempo de espera para que despachen combustible. Con respecto a la comida no había muchas opciones.

(Translated by Google)
There was a long wait for fuel. As for food, there weren't many options.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4Q2FraFNUa3hyVUhKV1lUaG5jVVl4ZERrMFlYYxAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio. Baños limpios. Cafeteria con espacio para descansar a tomar algo y kiosco completos y precios accesibles. Agua caliente disponible

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Clean restrooms. Cafeteria with ample seating and a well-stocked kiosk at affordable prices. Hot water available.

reviews.comment:
Empleadas re lerdas para atender ,15 minutos para pagar una coca cola.

(Translated by Google)
Employees are very slow to serve, it took 15 minutes to pay for a Coca-Cola.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio. Excelente parada al medio de la ruta 23. Baños limpios. Tiene un motel.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. Excellent stop in the middle of Route 23. Clean restrooms. It has a motel.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Long lines. They load and process payments slowly, and sometimes the POS terminal doesn't work.

reviews.comment:
Atención extremadamente lenta y poco ágil. En un lugar de paso, el servicio debería ser mucho más rápido.
La YPF carece de higiene, especialmente en los baños. Falta mantenimiento y mejor organización.

(Translated by Google)
Extremely slow and unresponsive service. In a high-traffic area, service should be much faster. The YPF station lacks hygiene, especially in the restrooms. Maintenance and organization are lacking.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205R2JUWlJPRTlLUnpCYWRGOXhlamhJVlROQ05uYxAB

reviews.comment:
Parada obligatoria..y más de media hora de espera para cargar...un desastre, en plena temporada el 50% de la playa cerrada. (La atención bien) Administrativamente un desastre de estación.

(Translated by Google)
A mandatory stop...and over half an hour's wait to refuel...a disaster, with 50% of the beach closed in peak season. (The service was fine) Administratively, the station is a disaster.
